Menu — Puckett's Restaurant
0
Y’all better
come hungry!
Our Menu
Our menu varies slightly by location, and our Pigeon Forge location serves lunch and dinner only. The sample menu below highlights what you typically find at any Puckett’s.
You can find your local Puckett’s
Here.
Locations
Order Online
Breakfast
Served 7am -11am Daily
Our Pigeon Forge location does not serve breakfast
BREAKFAST SKILLETS & PLATTERS
Cinnamon Roll Skillet
Five cream cheese glazed cinnamon rolls, served in a skillet for sharing 7.00
Biscuits & Gravy
Two biscuits smothered with sausage gravy 9.95
*Bubba’s Eggs Benedict
Split biscuit topped with bacon or sausage, two fried eggs and white pepper gravy on a bed of home fries,served in a cast iron skillet 13.00
*Smoked Brisket Hash
Beef brisket, sweet onions, bell peppers, home fries with two sunny-side up eggs and spicy BBQ sauce, served in a cast iron skillet 14.00
* Throwback Early Riser 2004 pricing
Two eggs cooked to order, bacon or sausage patties, and a biscuit 4.50 add home fries, white cheddar grits or fruit for 3

Pancake Mix-Ins:
Strawberries, bananas, blueberries or chocolate chips 2.95 ea.
* The Southern

OMELETS

Bacon, sausage, egg, American cheese, hashbrown casserole, white pepper gravy, Texas toast, served with white cheddar grits 11.75
Breakfast Burrito
Sausage, egg, hashbrown casserole, pepper jack cheese, smoked salsa, served with a side of fruit 10.75

Southern Fried Chicken

Burgers & Sandwiches
All original recipe burgers and sandwiches come with French fries • Sub house salad or skillet size side 3

MAKE RESERVATION
*CONSUMER ADVISORY: Please be advised consuming raw, cooked to order or undercooked meat, poultry, seafood, shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illnesses, especially if you have certain medical conditions. We want to make sure we do our best to accommodate all of our guests. Before placing your order, please inform us if a person in your party has a food allergy. Our products may contain wheat, egg, dairy, soy or fish allergens.
Puckett’s To Go Packs
Need to feed a crew of 4-6?
Try a Puckett’s To Go Pack!
Get 2 lbs of meat, 2 quart sides for $54.99. Packs include a dozen Cajun Corncakes, Original and Spicy BBQ sauces, 6 butters and 6 cutlery packs. Puckett’s to go Packs are served hot and ready to go!
